selection_metric: Highest validation F2 at the balanced_f2 threshold profile

leaderboard.description: SMOTE + random forest challenger to compare synthetic oversampling with weighted trees.
Balanced random forest that rebalances each tree during fitting.
Weighted logistic regression baseline with standardized features.
SMOTE + logistic regression benchmark implemented as an imbalanced-learn pipeline.
NearMiss + logistic regression teaching baseline; operationally weaker but useful for comparison.

anomaly_leaderboard.description: Unsupervised anomaly-detection baseline trained only on legitimate traffic.

weighted_logistic_regression.description: Weighted logistic regression baseline with standardized features.

balanced_random_forest.description: Balanced random forest that rebalances each tree during fitting.

smote_logistic_regression.description: SMOTE + logistic regression benchmark implemented as an imbalanced-learn pipeline.

smote_random_forest.description: SMOTE + random forest challenger to compare synthetic oversampling with weighted trees.

nearmiss_logistic_regression.description: NearMiss + logistic regression teaching baseline; operationally weaker but useful for comparison.

isolation_forest.description: Unsupervised anomaly-detection baseline trained only on legitimate traffic.

model_card.dataset: ULB credit-card fraud dataset via TensorFlow-hosted CSV mirror
model_card.champion_rationale: Selected as the highest validation balanced_f2 model while preserving strong precision at low alert rates.
limitations: Public benchmark features V1-V28 are anonymized PCA-like components.
The deployed reason codes are heuristic z-score explanations, not causal explanations.
Resampling challengers are included for comparison, but production decisions still rely on chronological holdout behavior.
